title: When the Steam Speaks
synopsis: Marina, a young mermaid, follows mysterious voices through underwater currents to arrive in a magical kitchen where sea and land creatures work together to save the ocean. But she arrives just as their secret meeting is discovered, and must help hide their important work.

pages.text:
The steam whispers my name through the water pipes above my head.

I press my ear against the coral wall of our underwater grotto and listen. "Marina," it hisses, soft as sea foam. "Marina, come up, come up."

Mama is sorting shells in the garden outside, her humming mixing with the whale songs from the deep. She doesn't hear what I hear. She doesn't know the pipes talk to mermaids who listen close enough.

"Four more minutes," the steam breathes. "Four more minutes until they meet."

Who meets? I wonder, but the voice fades like a wave pulling back from shore.

My tail flicks with excitement. The pipes have never spoken to me before. They've never told me secrets about the world above the waves. I look toward the surface, where golden light dances through the water like scattered coins.

The steam calls again, fainter now. "Come find the kitchen where sea meets sky."

illustration.description: An underwater grotto with coral walls and glowing pipes running along the ceiling. Marina, a young mermaid with long seafoam-green hair, a shimmering turquoise scaled tail, seashell accents, and sparkling aqua eyes, presses her ear against the coral wall listening intently. Steam and bubbles drift down from the pipes above. The scene has warm yellows and oranges filtering through the water.
illustration.alt: Marina listening to whispering voices in the underwater pipes

pages.text:
I follow the pipes up, up, up through secret channels in the reef.

The water grows warmer as I swim higher. Strange currents carry the smell of bread and butter, of cinnamon and salt. My gills tingle with the new tastes in the water.

"Three more minutes," whispers the steam. "Hurry, little mermaid. They're almost ready."

The pipes lead me through a crack in the sea floor I've never noticed before. It's just wide enough for a young mermaid to squeeze through. On the other side, the water shimmers differently, like it's mixed with starlight and wishes.

I can see a glow ahead – not sunlight, but something warmer. Kitchen light. The kind that makes shadows dance on walls and turns ordinary things magical.

My heart beats fast as seahorses. What kind of kitchen exists between the sea and the surface? What kind of meeting happens there?

The steam grows thicker around me. "Almost there," it murmurs. "Almost time."

illustration.description: Marina, a young mermaid with long seafoam-green hair, a shimmering turquoise scaled tail, seashell accents, and sparkling aqua eyes, swimming upward through a narrow channel filled with warm, glowing water. Pipes run along the rocky walls, and steam bubbles rise around her. The water ahead glows with warm kitchen light in yellows and oranges.
illustration.alt: Marina swimming up through a magical channel toward a glowing kitchen

pages.text:
The kitchen appears like a dream made of steam and warmth.

I surface in a large sink filled with enchanted seawater, my eyes wide as sand dollars. The windows are fogged with steam so thick I can barely see through them. Pots bubble on a stove that seems to cook with captured moonbeams. The air tastes of fresh herbs and ocean spray.

"Two more minutes," the steam warns, swirling around copper kettles and hanging ladles.

This is no ordinary kitchen. Seaweed grows in flowerpots on the windowsill. Barnacles cluster around the faucet handles. The wooden table is made from driftwood, smooth as sea glass.

I hear voices approaching from somewhere beyond the steamy haze. Footsteps on wooden floors. The soft splash of flippers. The click-click of crab claws.

"They come here to plan," whispers the steam. "Land creatures and sea creatures together. They work to heal the waters and the shores."

My scales shimmer with excitement. A secret meeting between two worlds! But why is the steam counting down?

illustration.description: A magical cozy kitchen with Marina, a young mermaid with long seafoam-green hair, a shimmering turquoise scaled tail, seashell accents, and sparkling aqua eyes, surfacing in a large sink filled with seawater. Steam rises from bubbling pots, windows are fogged, seaweed grows in flowerpots, and warm yellow and orange light fills the space. The kitchen has both underwater and above-water elements blended together.
illustration.alt: Marina emerging in a magical kitchen that bridges sea and land

pages.text:
"One more minute," breathes the steam, and suddenly I understand.

I'm not supposed to be here when they arrive. This meeting is secret, hidden, sacred. The steam was trying to help me find it before it started, not during.

But it's too late.

The kitchen door swings open just as I'm trying to duck back into the sink. A little otter wearing a tiny apron waddles in, followed by a hermit crab carrying rolled-up papers in his claws. Behind them comes a grandmother with seashells in her silver hair and sand between her toes.

They freeze when they see me.

"Oh my," says the grandmother softly. "We have a visitor."

The steam swirls around us all like a gentle hug. "Don't worry," it seems to whisper. "She's one of us."

The otter's whiskers twitch with curiosity instead of fear. The hermit crab waves a friendly claw. And the grandmother smiles like she's been expecting me all along.

"Welcome, little mermaid," she says. "We've been wondering when you'd join our work to save the sea."

illustration.description: The cozy kitchen filled with warm steam as Marina, a young mermaid with long seafoam-green hair, a shimmering turquoise scaled tail, seashell accents, and sparkling aqua eyes, meets a grandmother with seashells in her hair, a small otter in an apron, and a hermit crab carrying papers. The scene is bathed in warm yellows and oranges, with steam swirling around everyone like a magical embrace. The kitchen table is set with maps and plans.
illustration.alt: Marina meeting the secret group of environmental protectors in the steamy kitchen

coverPrompt.description: A cozy kitchen with steam rising from pots and pans, warm yellow and orange light filtering through foggy windows. In the center, Marina, a young mermaid with long seafoam-green hair, a shimmering turquoise scaled tail, seashell accents, and sparkling aqua eyes, peeks around a wooden cabinet. The kitchen has a magical underwater quality with bubbles floating near the ceiling and seaweed growing from flowerpots.
coverPrompt.alt: Marina the mermaid hiding in a warm, steamy kitchen

questions.question: What does Marina hear in the water pipes?
questions.explanation: Marina hears the steam whispering her name and telling her secrets about a meeting.

questions.question: What makes the kitchen special?
choices: it bridges the sea and land worlds
questions.explanation: The kitchen is magical because it exists between sea and land, with seawater sinks and seaweed in flowerpots.

questions.question: Who does Marina meet in the kitchen?
questions.explanation: Marina meets a little otter in an apron, a hermit crab with papers, and a grandmother with seashells in her hair.

questions.question: Why was the steam counting down?
choices: to warn her about the secret meeting time
questions.explanation: The steam was counting down to when the secret meeting would start, trying to help Marina arrive at the right time.

questions.question: What do the creatures in the kitchen work together to do?
questions.explanation: The steam tells Marina that land and sea creatures meet there to plan how to heal the waters and shores.
